scripts.docs:check: npm run docs:lint && npm run docs:links:proof && npm run docs:links && npm run check:doclinks && npm run check:docformat && npm run check:reachability
scripts.check:filesize:warn: echo "[exploratory] filesize checker with warn-only oneliner mode" && node tools/check-file-size.mjs --oneliner=warn
scripts.format: prettier --write package.json package-lock.json ".github/workflows/*.yml" .pre-commit-config.yaml .prettierrc.json .stylelintrc.json .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc jscpd.config.json eslint.config.mjs tsconfig.checkjs.json tsconfig.tests.json vitest.config.js "types/**/*.d.ts" "schemas/*.json" "runtime/**/*.js" "cluster/**/*.js" "config/**/*.js" "shared/**/*.js" "widgets/**/*.js" plugin.js plugin.mjs "tests/**/*.js" "tools/**/*.js" "tools/**/*.mjs" plugin.css "shared/**/*.css" "widgets/**/*.css" "tests/css/**/*.css" "*.md" "documentation/**/*.md" ".agents/skills/**/*.md" "exec-plans/active/*.md"
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json ".github/workflows/*.yml" .pre-commit-config.yaml .prettierrc.json .stylelintrc.json .markdownlint-cli2.jsonc jscpd.config.json eslint.config.mjs tsconfig.checkjs.json tsconfig.tests.json vitest.config.js "types/**/*.d.ts" "schemas/*.json" "runtime/**/*.js" "cluster/**/*.js" "config/**/*.js" "shared/**/*.js" "widgets/**/*.js" plugin.js plugin.mjs "tests/**/*.js" "tools/**/*.js" "tools/**/*.mjs" plugin.css "shared/**/*.css" "widgets/**/*.css" "tests/css/**/*.css" "*.md" "documentation/**/*.md" ".agents/skills/**/*.md" "exec-plans/active/*.md"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:source && npm run typecheck:tests
scripts.test:package: vitest run --project unit-node tests/tools/release-prepare.test.js tests/tools/release-create.test.js tests/tools/release-zip-builder.test.js
scripts.package:check: npm run schema:check && npm run test:package
scripts.check:standard: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run actions:lint && npm run duplication:check
scripts.check:fast: npm run check:standard && npm run typecheck && npm run test:node
scripts.check:core: npm run check:standard && npm run typecheck && npm run package:check && npm run test:contract && npm run test:focus:check && npm run check:smells && npm run check:complexity && npm run check:scaling && npm run docs:check && npm run check:filesize
scripts.check:all: npm run check:core && npm run test:coverage:check
scripts.test:coverage:check: npm run test:coverage && npm run check:coverage-inventory
